subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-04 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In order to do good things, one must have good intentions. So long as good intentions, which are even as a firmly planted root
subcodes.first_line_orig: حسن نیت بجهت اعمال حسنه لازم است تا نیت خیر که بمنزلهٴ ریشه و اصل محکم متین است
subcodes.subjects: @power of imagination; thought; right intention, @hypocrisy, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @love and unity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise of Western values; culture, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
